typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "MIPS64Memory: check that there is enough calldata"

arguments.value: MIPS64Memory: check that there is enough calldata

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "MIPS64Memory: check that there is enough calldata"

documentation.text:
@notice Validates that enough calldata is available to hold a full memory proof at the given offset
 @param _proofStartOffset The index of the first byte of the target memory proof in calldata
